items.name: Drum Booth
items.license_action: Install only through Ableton account or Live Browser Packs.
items.project_use: Dry acoustic drums for punk kit energy and human reinforcement under electronic drums.

items.name: String Quartet
items.license_action: Paid pack; verify account entitlement before installation.
items.project_use: Fiddle-like bowed lines, pizzicato pulses, tremolo tension, and chamber counterpoint.

items.name: Sequencers
items.license_action: Install through official Ableton pack flow; requires compatible Live/Max for Live license.
items.project_use: Generative and probability sequencing for banjo rolls, house stabs, and modular arrangement sketches.

items.name: Spectral Textures
items.license_action: Free official Ableton pack; install through official download flow.
items.project_use: Field-recording and additive-synthesis atmospheres for alien transitions.

items.name: Inspired by Nature
items.license_action: Included with Live 12 Suite on this host; do not commit pack files.
items.project_use: Generative soundscapes, evolving modulation, and natural-force Max for Live control.

items.name: Granulator III
items.license_action: Observed locally; do not commit pack files.
items.project_use: Granular transformation of banjo, fiddle, voice, and public-domain source fragments.

items.name: House Explorations
items.license_action: Purchase/install through Arturia account, in-app store, or official sound bank store.
items.project_use: Deep-house sub bass, chord stabs, EP keys, pads, and leads.

items.name: Guitar Deconstructed
items.license_action: Purchase/install through Arturia account, in-app store, or official sound bank store.
items.project_use: Granular guitar-source presets that bridge punk strum energy and abstract ambience.

items.name: Augmented STRINGS
items.license_action: Observed locally; use installed plugin, do not commit Arturia content.
items.project_use: Hybrid acoustic/synthetic string layers for fiddle-family gestures and cinematic swells.

items.name: Augmented WOODWINDS
